Bins & Recycling

Ceredigion County Council provides regular collections of household waste from all domestic properties in Ceredigion.

Presentation and collection of domestic waste

  • All waste should be presented on the morning of collection prior to 8am
  • If you are new to the area please contact us for a recycling pack

Waste Collection Service information is also available on My Account.

You can register or sign in on the My Account page.

The waste collection service is usually provided between 8am and 4pm, however there may be occasions where we work outside these hours. Please therefore do not report a missed bin until the day after your scheduled collection. Thank you.

Infectious diseases - related waste

Place all personal waste, such as used tissues, disposable cleaning cloths, disposable face coverings, disposable gloves and any other Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) in the non-recyclable waste (“black bag”). Double bag all your non-recyclable waste (“black bags”).

What day are my collections?

You can use our Postcode Search

Postcode Search

Food Waste Recycling Clear Recycling Bag Glass Recycling Box Absorbent Hygiene Waste (AHP) Residual Waste (Non-Recyclable Waste) Assisted Waste Collection Arrangements Garden Waste Bulky Household Waste Household Waste Sites & Recycling Banks What Happens to My Waste?

Waste Collection Service Updates

Waste collections may be affected by many things which include access issues, resource issues and adverse weather.

Please be assured that efforts are always made to provide the best possible level of service with the resources available at any given time

Waste Collection Updates

xhrs.body:
Household Waste Collections
  • Cymraeg
Collections for SY23 4RQ[Change]
Please make sure you present your waste for collection before 8.00am on the day of collection.
Weekly, every Monday Next collection: Monday 27th April
Clear Recycling Bag
Food Waste
Every 3 weeksNext collection: Monday 27th April
Non-Recyclable Waste
Glass Bottles and Jars
View all Ceredigion Waste Collection Service Disruptions
Downloads
Household waste calendar
If you cannot find your address, or believe your information to be incorrect, please contact us

Your route number is: 174
Your waste will be collected on the same day each week but times may vary.
The Council will aim to provide all waste collections. Any service disruptions will be advertised on the website http://www.ceredigion.gov.uk/servicedisruptions.
Recycling and Waste web pages
©2026 Cyngor Sir CEREDIGION County Council
Privacy Notice
